title: lippia pedunculata
intro: Lippia pedunculata, also known as African basil or wild basil, is a plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant effects. Lippia pedunculata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
